en: No, those meds you're taking. Without anxiety to keep your vanity in check,
ko: 아니, 네가 복용하고 있는 약 말이야.

en: you are vulnerable to a syndrome called hyper-narcissosis.
Okay, look. This apple is your ego.
ko: 자, 이 사과가 네 자아라고 생각해봐.

en: Imagine it expanding to the point of critical mass,
ko: 그것이 임계 질량에 도달할 정도로 커지는 걸 상상해봐,

en: taking over your whole personality, making you an uncontrollable monster.
Britta, how didn't Apple make that clear? Imagine it expanding? Use a balloon.
ko: 브리타, 애플이 그걸 명확히 하지 않은 건 어떻게 된 거야? 커지는 걸 상상해? 풍선을 사용해. 난 점심 먹으러 가는 중이었어.

en: I was on my way to lunch. Why are you trying to take this away from me?
I like having no anxiety. I'm in harmony with the world.
Looking good, Winger. Thank you, Leonard, for that compliment and for your service to this country.
I'm so confident now I can pull things off I never dreamed possible.
ko: 지금 나는 자신감이 넘쳐서 내가 꿈꿨던 것들을 해낼 수 있어.

en: Look. Aviators. Final boarding call, Beefcake Airways.
I'm warning you as your friend to get off of those meds,
ko: 친구로서 경고하는데, 그 약을 끊고, 그 약이 몸에서 빠질 때까지,

en: and until they're out of your system, stay away from flattering situations,
weddings, soft lighting, formal wear, gay bars, and take those off.
ko: 결혼식, 부드러운 조명, 정장, 게이 바, 그리고 그걸 벗어.

en: Because they make me look good. That's not relevant.
ko: 왜냐하면 그게 나를 멋져 보이게 하거든. 그건 중요하지 않아.

en: Ah, welcome back, Jeffrey. How was your...
Oh, my God, even in shadow. Look at his shadow!
